title: Youtube Poop - Strive for Love Finale (part 1 of 2)
description:
Here it is, the epic conclusion to a fantastic series! 

Having lost the Triforce of Courage to Ganon, the King sits in his prison cell completely powerless... meanwhile Zelda wants to recruit some allies for the big battle against Ganon... of course this is just the beginning! You have to watch to see what happens! :P

This video had a consecutive 5-star streak up until 2-21-08... Whoever was the 38th rater ruined it! :P

Watch the entire series!
